subject: Re: SALE OF S76
body:
I have said three times 13 net


----- Original Message ----
From: "DKIESQ@aol.com" <DKIESQ@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Sunday, November 11, 2007 1:38:54 PM
Subject: SALE OF S76


Reenstra asked if you had any kind of counter offer on the helicopter.  He invited a counter to total price and commission, so that you come up with a net payment that you would accept.  Please advise.
 
Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com
